name: teamwork-skill
description: Codex-first skills, with Cursor and Claude Code adapters, for cited external research, decision design, debugging, review, project setup, and long-running goals; routine local work stays native.

interface.shortDescription: External research and decision design where native Codex benefits from stronger constraints.
interface.longDescription: Teamwork adds focused workflows for cited external research, decision design and brainstorming, failure diagnosis, adversarial review, explicit question-led discussion, project setup, and long-running convergence. Routine local inspection and authorized implementation stay with Codex's native workflow, while focused read-only local evidence questions use teamwork-explore; no router or execution skill is required. You choose the scope and authorize changes; Codex remains in control of tools and permissions.
defaultPrompt: Use $teamwork-update to enable full Teamwork for this Codex plugin.
Use $teamwork-research to investigate this current external question from primary sources with linked citations.
Use $teamwork-design to inspect context, explore viable options, ask material questions, and produce a decision-ready design.
